narrative:
Jackson Twp (precinct in Putnam County) has 646 registered voters, with 50.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.7 percentage points.
